Type Property# textDidChange

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+

```
static var textDidChange: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UITextView.TextDidChangeMessage> { get }
```
